\begin{Verbatim}[breaklines=true,formatcom=\color{ada_blue}]
storm_adjustment <- 8000000

pred_df$fit_adj <- pred_df$fit
pred_df$lwr_adj <- pred_df$lwr
pred_df$upr_adj <- pred_df$upr

march_row <- format(pred_df$date, "%b") == "Mar"

pred_df$fit_adj[march_row] <- pred_df$fit[march_row] - storm_adjustment
pred_df$lwr_adj[march_row] <- pred_df$lwr[march_row] - storm_adjustment
pred_df$upr_adj[march_row] <- pred_df$upr[march_row] - storm_adjustment

pred_df$outside_adj <- with(pred_df, recorded < lwr_adj | recorded > upr_adj)
pred_df
\end{Verbatim}
